voice_description: A youthful female voice with a clear, earnest tone. The delivery is slightly breathless and dramatic, with precise diction and a soft, gentle cadence.
text: Oh, sir, it will break bones. I am very glad to see you. This question absorbed all his mental powers. Before going away forever, I'll tell him all. I told you it was mother.
instruction: A 38-year-old male speaker with a warm, clear tenor timbre, exhibiting a slightly breathy and subtly nasal delivery, delivering this high-quality studio voice recording with no background noise. The delivery conveys a sense of excited gratitude and a touch of wistful remembrance, with precise articulation and a steady, natural pace. He’s projecting a feeling of genuine pleasure and a desire to share a significant story.
